mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u1.real_name as coach_name, u2.real_name as student_name FROM appointments a LEFT JOIN users u1 ON a.coach_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON a.student_id = u2.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT a.*, u1.real_name as coach_name, u2.real_name as student_name FROM appointments a LEFT JOIN users u1 ON a.coach_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON a.student_id = u2.id WHERE a.coach_id = #{coachId} ORDER BY a.appointment_date DESC, a.start_time ASC

SELECT a.*, u1.real_name as coach_name, u2.real_name as student_name FROM appointments a LEFT JOIN users u1 ON a.coach_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON a.student_id = u2.id WHERE a.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY a.appointment_date DESC, a.start_time ASC

SELECT a.*, u1.real_name as coach_name, u2.real_name as student_name FROM appointments a LEFT JOIN users u1 ON a.coach_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON a.student_id = u2.id WHERE a.coach_id = #{coachId} AND a.appointment_date = #{date} ORDER BY a.start_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE appointments SET coach_id = #{coachId}, student_id = #{studentId}, appointment_date = #{appointmentDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, location = #{location}, status = #{status}, notes = #{notes} WHERE id = #{id}
